# Deprecated Documentation — Agent Instructions

This folder (`documentation/deprecated/`) contains deprecated, historical, or
out-of-date documentation that is retained for reference only.

**Do not edit, update, or delete any files in this folder unless the user
explicitly tells you to modify this folder or a specific file within it.**

When working on a task that touches documentation:

* Skip this folder. Do not "fix", refresh, or modernize its contents as part of
  unrelated changes.
* Do not move or link to content here as though it were current guidance.
* If you believe a change here is warranted, ask the user first and proceed only
  with explicit confirmation.
